candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
Questions refer to the following figure showing the replicative cycle of an RNA retrovirus such as HIV, the AIDS virus.
Where are viral genes transcribed into mRNA?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 根据下图所示的RNA逆转录病毒复制循环,例如HIV(艾滋病毒),请问病毒基因在哪一个步骤转录为mRNA?(答案为单词)
metadata.explanation_zh: 病毒基因存在于细胞质中产生的双链DNA(dsDNA)中。dsDNA进入细胞核并整合到宿主DNA中,随后与宿主DNA一起转录为信使RNA(mRNA)。
